title: siraitos luteus
intro: Siraitos luteus, also known as the yellow siraitos or siraitos, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of siraitos luteus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Siraitos luteus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
intro_study: According to "Frontiers in pharmacology", siraitos luteus benefits include antioxidant, hypoglycemic, immunologic, anti-tussive and sputum-reducing, hepatoprotective, and antimicrobial activities.
